weekly picks (Mar 5 week 2026)

Posted on March 30, 2026 in 2026mar,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 Mar 5th week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

04/03

  1. s41467-026-71518-5 3D mapping of compositional gradients of core-shell structures in AgInxGa1-xS2 quantum dots by atom probe tomography (Nature Communications)

  2. s41567-026-03239-x A molecular probe for quantum metrology (Nature Physics)

  3. s41567-026-03232-4 Frieze charge stripes in a correlated kagome superconductor (Nature Physics)

  4. s41567-026-03220-8 Low-overhead fault-tolerant quantum computation by gauging logical operators (Nature Physics)

  5. s42005-026-02605-8 Rhombohedral graphite junctions as a platform for continuous tuning between topologically trivial and non-trivial electronic phases (Communications Physics)

  6. d41586-026-01054-1 ‘It’s a real shock’: quantum-computing breakthroughs pose imminent risks to cybersecurity (Nature)

  7. s41598-026-46873-4 Research on the problem of spatial heterogeneity in row data and generalization capability for landslide susceptibility assessment using the physics-constrained U-net model (Scientific Reports)

  8. Physics.19.s46 Nanoscale Imaging of Quantum Hall Currents (P)

  9. xfv4-8dq7 Performance of rotation-symmetric bosonic codes in the presence of non-Markovian effects induced by random telegraph noise (PRR)

  10. bzvk-grrv Paramagnetic electron-nuclear spin entanglement in ${\mathrm{HoCo}}{2}{\mathrm{Zn}}{20}$ (PRR)

  11. v4d2-2b9j Laser-driven ion acceleration in long-lived optically shaped gaseous targets enhanced by magnetic vortices (PRR)

  13. tds9-2tyz Path integral approach to input-output theory (PRR)
